requirements.summary: Remove the PowerPoint to PDF tool from the application entirely
acceptanceCriteria: The PowerPoint to PDF tool card is no longer visible on the dashboard or login page tool grid.
Navigating to the PowerPoint to PDF tool route/toolId no longer renders the tool.
No broken imports or references to PowerPointToPDFTool remain in the codebase.
All other tools continue to function normally.

file_operations.description: Remove the PowerPoint to PDF tool card from the dashboard tool grid. Locate the array or list of tool definitions that render tool cards and remove the entry with id 'powerpoint-to-pdf' or similar identifier.

Remove the PowerPoint to PDF tool card from the login page tool grid. Locate the array or list of tool definitions that render tool cards and remove the entry with id 'powerpoint-to-pdf' or similar identifier.
Remove the PowerPointToPDFTool import statement and remove the corresponding case/condition that renders PowerPointToPDFTool when the toolId matches 'powerpoint-to-pdf' or similar identifier.
Delete the PowerPointToPDFTool component file entirely as it is no longer needed in the application.
